sections.paragraph:
Original: צחק

Transliteration: tsâchaq

Phonetic: tsaw-khak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to laugh, mock, play
    1. (Qal) to laugh
    2. (Piel)
      1. to jest
      2. to sport, play, make sport, toy with, make a toy of

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1905

Part(s) of speech: Verb
